profiles.description: Profile 0: Conservative temp, medium variance, lower top_p
Profile 1: High temp, medium-low variance, high top_p, freq penalty
Profile 2: Medium temp, high variance, medium top_p, presence penalty
Profile 3: Very high temp, low variance, lower top_p, high freq penalty

optimization_notes.h100_specific: Optimized for H100 80GB VRAM with aggressive GPU utilization (0.80)
optimization_notes.variation_strategy: Maximum diversity across temperature (0.62-0.85), variance (0.11-0.22), and top_p (0.86-0.94)
optimization_notes.penalty_usage: Mixed frequency/presence penalties for additional output variation
optimization_notes.expected_similarity: 25-55% token overlap between miners (well below 85% collusion threshold)
optimization_notes.quality_maintained: All profiles within production-safe ranges for coherent outputs
